title: RM06 collectors fail-closed test
objective:
Create file tests/governance/test_collectors_fail_closed_integration.py with content import subprocess
import sys

COLLECTORS = [
    "governance/runners/telegram_production_receipt_collector.py",
    "governance/runners/live_runtime_receipt_collector.py",
    "governance/runners/external_claude_audit_result_collector.py",
]

def test_all_external_receipt_collectors_fail_closed_without_env():
    for path in COLLECTORS:
        result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, path], capture_output=True, text=True)
        assert result.returncode == 2, path
        assert "release_pass" in result.stdout
        assert "blocked_missing_real" in result.stdout
